description: A shipment has arrived from 'Mediterranean Provisions Co.' containing food products that require strict traceability. Using the shipment details (lot numbers and expiration dates) provided in '/home/ga/Desktop/shipment_details.txt', configure 'Organic Whole Wheat Flour 25kg' and 'Extra Virgin Olive Oil 5L' for lot tracking and process the pending receipt for the associated Purchase Order. Assign the specified lot numbers and expiration dates to the received quantities and validate the transfer to complete the process. Login credentials: Email: admin@example.com, Password: admin. Database: odoo_demo.
